text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a veritable maelstrom of fervor and
excitement, the curtain falls on the Twinkle Star
Climax.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The entire crowd celebrates the moment that
<chrname> is crowned the greatest
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
What an electric atmosphere. Everyone's cheering
for you two!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I have to hear your thoughts! How does it feel to
see your partner crowned as the greatest?!
choice_data_list: Even if I was the only spectator here...
Even if I was the only spectator here...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Yes?
choice_data_list:
I would still confidently declare that my partner
was the greatest.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Umm, but... The myriad spectators here in the
stands are praising your achievement.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
They're precisely why your partner is being
recognized and celebrated as the greatest
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Even I think... that she's the fastest...
choice_data_list: You don't truly mean that, do you?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Huh? O-of course I do. The Twinkle Star Climax
was a massive success and—
choice_data_list:
You believe in the Umamusume who's greatest
in your heart.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: ...The greatest in my heart?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You're too slow, Etsie! Hurry up or I'll leave you
behind!

text_block_list.name: Human Girl
text_block_list.text: W-wait up!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! I win!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: The truth is, I...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't help but think that if my childhood
friend had entered the Climax, she would have
won the most points.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Even though a different Umamusume was
crowned the greatest and is being lauded by this
huge crowd... deep down, I wanted my friend to
win.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Boy, today's race was phenomenal!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what the next Climax will be like. I bet
there are gonna be loads of challengers eager to
take the crown.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I'm already excited! I hope my fave runs in the
next Climax!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Watching her become crowned the greatest from
the stands would be like a dream come true!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: A dream...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: ...Perhaps my dream has been alive all this time.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Ever since the day I lost that race, I feel like I've
been chasing after my friend—chasing my dream.
choice_data_list:
Maybe there are as many "greatest"
Umamusume as there are dreams.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
...You might be right. Everyone places their hopes
on the shoulders of the Umamusume they believe
in.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
However! For today at least, the title of
"greatest" belongs to only one Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Now, Trainer <username>!
Please say a few words for everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And thus, in both name and reality,
<chrname> becomes the greatest
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The proof of her strength gleams brilliantly, now
and always.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, even if there was no trophy, nor any
spectators in the stands...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I would never stop believing in my dream—never
stop believing that she's the greatest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The proof of her strength gleams brilliantly, now
and always.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, even if there was no trophy, nor any
spectators in the stands...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I would never stop believing in my dream—never
stop believing that she's the greatest.

text_block_list.text:
The proof of her strength gleams brilliantly, now
and always.

text_block_list.text:
However, even if there was no trophy, nor any
spectators in the stands...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I would never stop believing in my dream—never
stop believing that she's the greatest.

text_block_list.text:
The proof of her strength gleams brilliantly, now
and always.

text_block_list.text:

spectators in the stands...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I would never stop believing in my dream—never
stop believing that she's the greatest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The proof of her strength gleams brilliantly, now
and always.

text_block_list.text:

spectators in the stands...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I would never stop believing in my dream—never
stop believing that she's the greatest.
